log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 23 damage. Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration HP: 44/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration --- HP: 44/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration --- HP: 44/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration HP: 29/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):4+8=12 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration HP: 9/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):7+8=15 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration HP: -10/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):16+8=24 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══

--- Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration --- HP: 40/67 | AC: 14

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
